title: chrysosplenium pilosum var. villosum
intro: Chrysosplenium pilosum var. villosum, also known as the hairy or woolly spleenwort, is a type of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Chrysosplenium pilosum var. villosum can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
